creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
> ====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
> ===> Parsing plist
> ===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
> Error: Orphaned: share/doc/cryptokit/cryptokit/Cryptokit.Base64.html
> Error: Orphaned: share/doc/cryptokit/cryptokit/Cryptokit.Block.aes_decrypt-c.html
> Error: Orphaned: share/doc/cryptokit/cryptokit/Cryptokit.Block.aes_encrypt-c.html
...

These options in /etc/make.conf triggered the error:
> OPTIONS_UNSET= DOCS HTMLDOCS HELP PORTDOCS APIDOCS RDOC MANPAGES EXAMPLES PORTEXAMPLES NLS KERBEROS TESTS DEBUG FASTDEBUG DOXYGEN JAVA JAVAHELP
> OPTIONS_SET=   PULSEAUDIO SOUND WEBRTC IPV6 THREADED_RESOLVER THREADS OPENGL DJVU OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS SIMD MMX SSE CUPS GDB
